title: Software Developer (Programmatūras izstrādātājs/-a) in CODE Tribe | SEB Riga

summary.lv: SEB Rīga meklē Software Developer CODE Tribe komandai — izstrādāt CRM risinājumus Baltijas klientiem, izmantojot OpenEdge ABL, Java/Spring Boot un modern DevOps rīkus.
summary.en: SEB Riga is looking for a Software Developer for the CODE Tribe to build CRM solutions for Baltic customers using OpenEdge ABL, Java/Spring Boot, and modern DevOps tooling.
